goal: Redesign the reading-result 'Related Internal Links' panel (Daily/Question) from plain underlined links into the Claude Design 'RelatedLinks' card: gold-underlined title, a 'read full meaning' hero row per drawn card with real card-art thumbnail, divider eyebrow, and three reading-mode tiles (Daily/Question/Full) with icons + TH/EN sublabels.
done: Rewrote appendReadingInternalLinks() in js/reading.js to build the new DOM (hero rows wired to real card data via buildCardMeaningUrl + getStableCardImageSources/applyImgFallback, reversed orientation rotates thumb); replaced buildReadingEntryLinks() with buildReadingEntryTiles() + inline SVG glyphs. Added full §14 related-links styling in css/reading.css mapped to --mt-* theme tokens (double-class selectors to beat legacy daily-mode overrides in styles.css). Verified visually via headless-Chrome render of the exact generated markup against real CSS — matches mockup. Mirrored to www/ + cap sync ios.
verified: headless-chrome screenshot of generated markup vs RelatedLinks.dc.html mockup; node --check js/reading.js passes
